compositional_truth_check.p1_yellow_pot: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter; soil appears dormant/barren.
compositional_truth_check.p2_black_pot: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter; soil appears dormant/barren.
compositional_truth_check.p3_black_pot_rabbit: Present: Pothos specimen remains, though showing signs of stress.
compositional_truth_check.p4_black_pot_shared: Present: Single-leaf specimen (likely Pothos cutting or sprout) present with eggshell debris.

inventory_reconciliation.notes: P1 and P2 are currently devoid of visible vegetative growth. P3 and P4 are the only active biological units.

plant_audit.p3: Single leaf visible, healthy turgor, rabbit anchor present.
plant_audit.p4: Single leaf cutting, appears stable but isolated.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments in P4; electronic component (IC chip) present on desk surface in later images.
biome_observations.anomalies: Introduction of a food wrapper (Unibic) in the final frame.

temporal_deltas.t_minus_5_to_current: The P4 specimen has remained largely static in posture. The desk surface has accumulated non-botanical debris (IC chip, food wrapper). No new growth observed in P1 or P2.

vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is currently in a state of arrested development. While the Pothos in P3 and the cutting in P4 maintain structural integrity, the primary registry plants (P1, P2) show no signs of life. The environment is increasingly cluttered with non-botanical artifacts, which may indicate a lack of dedicated horticultural maintenance.
